title: California Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2024
content:
Key Takeaways

  • Overall sales of LDVs in California have fallen by a greater margin than ZEV sales on a Quarter-on-Quarter (QoQ) basis.
  • EV penetration in sales along with overall EV sales in the state have declined marginally on a Year-on-Year (YoY) basis.
  • California's share in national EV sales has shrunk between Q3 2023 and Q3 2024.
author: Aakanksha
